Quadriceps muscles from 16-week-old mice were snap frozen in isopentane

The male C57BL/6 mice aged 9-11 weeks used in this study were purchased from CLEA Japan Inc. (To kyo, Japan)
Mice were recruited into the study at the age of 60 days and were trained on the rotarod for 7 min at 10 rpm

A total of 48 locally bred young (∼ 2-4 month old) male and female Fisher 344 × Brown Norway hybrid (FBN) rats were socially housed in a temperature-controlled environment (∼ 22 $^{·}$C) with a 12 h light/dark cycle and met all inclusion criterion defined below
The experiments were performed on adult male ASC mice (aged 3 to 4 months; the 32nd generation of selection)
Male Wistar rats (Tel Aviv University Medical School, Israel) approximately 3 months old and weighing 350-450 g were used
Sex-matched mice at the age of 7-12 weeks were used in all experiments

Adult male Sprague-Dawley (SD) rats (7-8 weeks, weighing 240-260 g) were purchased from Samtako Bio Korea (Osan, Korea) and maintained under temperature-and lightcontrolled conditions (20-23 °C, 12 h light/12 h dark cycle) with food and water provided ad libitum
Male 10-week-old ddY mice (SLC, Inc., Japan) were used in this study
Male 10-week-old SHRs (SHR/Hos, SPF) were purchased from Hoshino Laboratory Animals, Inc. (Ibaraki, Japan)
Ten male New Zealand white rabbits, 3 months old and weighing 2.5-3.0 kg (mean weight 2.73 kg), were provided with a standard diet and water
Male C57BL6/J mice between ages 8 and 10 weeks were purchased from Jackson Laboratory (Bar Harbor, ME
Male C57BL/6 mice (Nihon SLC Co., Shizuoka, Japan) six weeks of age, were used in this study
Female C57BL/6 (B6; H-2$^{b}$) and NOD/Lt (H-2$^{g7}$) mice aged 12-15 weeks, were obtained from the Central Animal House at La Trobe University
A total of 98 eight-week-old male Institute of Cancer Research (ICR) mice were reared in standard conditions of 23$_{7}$1 $_{°}$C temperature, 55% humidity, and 12 h light/dark cycle
The study used 60 male Wistar rats (3-4 months old, purchased from Rappolovo, Russia) weighing 180-200 g at the start of the experiment
were performed on adult males at end stage (z 150-180 d); end stage was defined as a 20% decrease from peak body mass
Adult (10 weeks) female BALB/c×DBA/2 F1 (CD2F1) mice weighing 20-22 g were obtained from Charles River Laboratories

Five cohorts of adult male long-Evan rats (Harlan Laboratories, Indianapolis, IN, USA; 250-300 g, 8 weeks old) were individually housed and maintained in a room on a 12/12-h light/dark cycle at 25 1 C and 50-60% humidity
WT mice and tPA KO mice (gifts from the Center for Transgene Technology and Gene Therapy, KU Leuven, Belgium), 9 to 12 weeks old were used
Male 7-to-8-week-old C57BL/6 J mice were purchased from the National Laboratory Animal Center, Taiwan

Male Sprague Dawley rats (age, 6 weeks; weight, 180±10 g, n=26) were purchased from the Animal Experiment Center of Shandong University (Shandong, China) and individually housed (temperature, 23±1˚C; 55-60% humidity) and were exposed to a 12 h light/dark cycle (lights on from 8:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m.)
Male WAG/Rij, Wistar and ACI rats (1 and 6$_{e}$7 months old) were purchased from Harlan Italy Srl (Correzzana, Milan, Italy)
